creator: yvan.vanhullebus@netasq.com
text:
On Sat, Sep 01, 2007 at 06:18:33AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/ipsec-tools,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/115989 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115989

Issue is fixed in ipsec-tools 0.7.0 release, and I already filled
ports/115978 to do the port update to this version.


Yvan.
